name: Take Flight
description:
Launch yourself at an enemy, dealing 4106 Flame Damage to all enemies in the area, knocking them back 4 meters, and stunning them for 2 seconds. If the target is a monster they are instead knocked into the air and stunned for 3 seconds.

Upon activation you are filled with draconic fury for 15 seconds, increasing your damage done by 10%. This effect's potency doubles against monsters.
